title: Hierarchy of Granularity Levels in Multiple Granularity Locking
description: A diagram showing the hierarchical tree structure of data granularity, from the entire database down to individual fields, and how intention locks propagate.
relationships: Database contains Areas, Areas contain Files, Files contain Records, Records contain Fields. Intention locks (IS, IX) are acquired on higher levels before explicit locks (S, X) are acquired on lower levels.
